channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ABS-CBN Announces Lotto Results for July 11, 2026
item.description: The article reports the official release of the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) lotto results for July 11, 2026. Published by ABS-CBN News, the update highlights the winning numbers and e...

item.title: Chris Pappas Confirmed as DA's uMngeni Mayoral Candidate, Commits to Continued Governance
item.description: Chris Pappas has been officially announced as the Democratic Alliance’s (DA) mayoral candidate for uMngeni Local Municipality ahead of the 2026 local government elections. The current mayor of uMngeni...

item.title: Dubai Recognizes Tanzania as Strategic Tourism Market in Africa
item.description: Tanzania has been officially designated by Dubai’s Department of Economy and Tourism (DET) as a key strategic market for tourism development across Africa. This recognition highlights the country’s gr...

item.title: England Prepares for World Cup Quarter-Final Against Norway with Key Players Back in Training
item.description: England's football team is preparing for their World Cup quarter-final against Norway, with key players Marc Guehi and Declan Rice returning to training after injury and illness concerns. Manager Thom...

item.title: Saudi Training of Somali Soldiers Sparks Concerns Over Military Doctrine Erosion
item.description: A Saudi-funded military training program in Somalia, supported by instructors from Romania, Ukraine, South Africa, and Colombia, is raising alarms about the risk of fragmented military doctrines withi...

item.title: Vybz Kartel and Mavado Reunite for Historic Concert in London
item.description: Vybz Kartel and Mavado, two legendary dancehall artists known for their intense rivalry, are set to reunite on stage for the first time in 18 years. The UK exclusive show at London's The O2 on Septemb...

item.title: Labour Party unveils Bintu Konto as VP candidate for 2027 election, highlights her experience in public health and humanitarian work
item.description: The Labour Party has officially announced Hajja Bintu Konto as their Vice Presidential Candidate for the 2027 Presidential Election, to run alongside Presidential Candidate Chibuzo Okereke. Konto, a s...

item.title: Evil Dead Burn: A Fractured Family's Descent into Horror
item.description: Evil Dead Burn (R18+, 110 minutes) is the latest installment in the iconic horror franchise, directed by French filmmaker Sébastien Vanicek. The film follows Alice, a young woman dealing with her abus...

item.title: AI Discovers Critical Linux Kernel Vulnerability After 15 Years, Alongside Pentagon's Hacker Training and License Plate Reader Controversy
item.description: A significant cybersecurity vulnerability was uncovered in the Linux kernel after 15 years, with AI tools identifying a critical flaw that allows unauthorized root access. The bug, dubbed GhostLock (C...

item.title: Canada's Farmland Crisis: Challenges and Government Strategies
item.description: The article highlights Canada's ongoing crisis of losing farmland to urban expansion, development, and rising costs, threatening food security. Charles Stevens, a fruit farmer in Ontario, refused a $1...

item.title: Governor Okpebholo Praises Peaceful and High Voter Turnout in Edo LG Election
item.description: Governor Monday Okpebholo of Edo State praised the high voter turnout and peaceful conduct during the local government elections, calling it a demonstration of grassroots democracy. He highlighted tha...

item.title: Youth disillusionment with elections amid unfulfilled promises and systemic failures
item.description: As South Africa approaches local government elections, young citizens are expressing growing frustration with the political system. The article highlights the disconnect between political promises and...

item.title: PM Modi highlights India-New Zealand ties through 'Waka' symbolism
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi emphasized the deepening India-New Zealand relations during his visit to New Zealand, using the indigenous Maori concept of 'Waka' to symbolize the shared journey between ...

item.title: SK Hynix Shares See High Trading Volume in Early Session
item.description: The stock market experienced significant trading activity for SK Hynix (KRX:000660) during the first half hour of trading, with over 52 million shares changing hands. This volume surpasses the average...

item.title: East Africa's Economic Growth Potential and Regional Integration
item.description: The article highlights East Africa's emergence as a key economic growth engine in Africa, driven by regional integration, infrastructure development, and demographic trends. The East African Community...

item.title: Bette Davis's Early Life as Maine's First Female Lifeguard Before Hollywood Stardom
item.description: This article explores the lesser-known chapter of Bette Davis's life before her iconic Hollywood career. In 1926, Davis became Maine's first female lifeguard after completing Red Cross training and jo...

item.title: Argentina's Martinez praises referees' performance at FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Argentina defender Lisandro Martinez has dismissed controversies surrounding refereeing decisions during the FIFA World Cup 2026, commending match officials for their performance after Egypt criticize...

item.title: Quebec's Population Shifts: Regional Growth and Decline Projections
item.description: New projections from the Institut de la statistique du Québec (ISQ) reveal that Quebec's population growth will become increasingly uneven across the province. While regions like the Capitale-National...

item.title: Dutch Migrants' Legacy and Integration in Post-WWII Australia
item.description: The article explores the experiences of Dutch migrants who settled in Australia after World War Two, focusing on their cultural preservation, language shift, and historical trauma. David Van Berkel's ...

item.title: A Voyage Through Love and Loss: Navigating Relationships on the Open Sea
item.description: This reflective memoir recounts a tumultuous relationship aboard a boat journey to Hawaii, where the author grapples with emotional insecurity, trust issues, and conflicting beliefs. The narrative unf...
